title: Cable Ties Clear White 300mm x 4mm (100 Pack), Plastic Zip Ties Long Heavy Duty with 40lbs Tensile Strength, Self-Locking Nylon Plastic Wire Ties Wraps for Office, Household and Outdoor
features: DIMENSIONS - Length: 11.8 inches/300mm; Width: 0.15 Inch/4 mm; Color: White; Quantity: 100 pack Nylon Zip Ties; Material: Nylon.
SELF-LOCKING - Self-locking Design, Strong durable, easy handling.Easily tighten the white zip ties to the desired length and the self-locking teeth will keep the zip tie tightly in place.
CABLE TIES HEAVY DUTY - Tensile Strength: 40lbs/18kg; KAXIMON white cable ties are made of nylon 66 and offer a strong fixed nonslip design ensuring to be used in outdoor and indoor conditions.
WIDE USE - The cable ties can be used for home, office, garage, travel, Ideal for multi-purpose, bundling, cable management and organizational projects.

UV RESISTANT– KAXIMON clear cable ties are suitable in a variety of different conditions. The plastic cable ties will not fade or break between the temperature range of -40°C to +85 °C making them the perfect solution, hot or cold.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page 1 Self-locking Design 2 Heat/Cold Resistant 3 UV Resistant
